title: 1 Bedroom Apartment – Parakin
description: Clean and well-maintained 1-bedroom apartment in the heart of Parakin. Tiled floors throughout, a functional kitchen, and reliable water supply. Ideal for a single occupant or couple.

reviews.name: Blessing A.
reviews.text: Very affordable and the landlord is responsive. I've been here a year and it's been great.

reviews.name: Seun O.
reviews.text: Quiet environment, good for studying. Water supply is reliable.
